6:
WITH cons AS (
    SELECT c.CustomerID,
           c.Segment,
           SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
      AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_cons AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           MIN(total_consumption) AS min_total
    FROM cons
    GROUP BY Segment
),
lowest AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           SUM(c.total_consumption) AS sum_total,
           COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM cons c
    JOIN min_cons m
      ON c.Segment = m.Segment
     AND c.total_consumption = m.min_total
    GROUP BY c.Segment
),
avg_cons AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           sum_total / cnt AS avg_consumption
    FROM lowest
)
SELECT
    COALESCE((SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_cons WHERE Segment = 'SME'), 0) -
    COALESCE((SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_cons WHERE Segment = 'LAM'), 0) AS diff_SME_LAM,
    COALESCE((SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_cons WHERE Segment = 'LAM'), 0) -
    COALESCE((SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_cons WHERE Segment = 'KAM'), 0) AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    COALESCE((SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_cons WHERE Segment = 'KAM'), 0) -
    COALESCE((SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_cons WHERE Segment = 'SME'), 0) AS diff_KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
WITH seg_cons AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           substr(y.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
           SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
      AND substr(y.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, substr(y.Date, 1, 4)
),
pivot AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2012' THEN total_consumption END) AS cons_2012,
           MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2013' THEN total_consumption END) AS cons_2013
    FROM seg_cons
    GROUP BY Segment
),
pct AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           (cons_2013 - cons_2012) AS increase,
           CASE WHEN cons_2013 != 0 THEN ((cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2013) END AS pct_increase
    FROM pivot
)
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM pct
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MAX(pct_increase) FROM pct)
   OR pct_increase = (SELECT MIN(pct_increase) FROM pct);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

FROM
    (SELECT t.account_id, t.balance
     FROM trans t
     JOIN (SELECT account_id, MAX(trans_id) AS max_id
           FROM trans
           WHERE date = '1993-03-22'
           GROUP BY account_id) m
       ON t.account_id = m.account_id AND t.trans_id = m.max_id) b_start
JOIN
    (SELECT t.account_id, t.balance
     FROM trans t
     JOIN (SELECT account_id, MAX(trans_id) AS max_id
           FROM trans
           WHERE date = '1998-12-27'
           GROUP BY account_id) m
       ON t.account_id = m.account_id AND t.trans_id = m.max_id) b_end
  ON b_start.account_id = b_end.account_id
JOIN
    (SELECT l.account_id
     FROM loan l
     WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05' AND l.status = 'approved'
     ORDER BY l.loan_id
     LIMIT 1) first_loan
  ON first_loan.account_id = b_start.account_id;	----- bird -----	financial
